# familiar.systems

familiar.systems is an AI-assisted campaign wiki for tabletop RPG game masters.

It captures session content (audio, notes) and uses AI to assemble a campaign
knowledge base: NPCs, locations, items, factions, and the relationships between
them, as a graph that grows from play.

## Status

Pre-launch. The public site is live; the application is under active development.

## Links

- Website: https://loreweaver.no
- GitHub: https://github.com/familiar-systems
- License: AGPL-3.0
